category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Argentina EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入阿根廷：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入阿根廷：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China GB/T EV conductive charging documentation against Argentina IRAM / IEC references, ENRE or distributor grid-connection expectations, 50 Hz electrical assumptions, and EV policy context.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国GB/T电动汽车传导充电文件与阿根廷IRAM/IEC参考、ENRE或配电商并网要求、50Hz电气假设及电动汽车政策背景差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國GB/T電動汽車傳導充電文件與阿根廷IRAM/IEC參考、ENRE或配電商併網要求、50Hz電氣假設及電動汽車政策背景差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IRAM scope determination, ENRE or distributor grid-connection approval, electrical-installation approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Argentina standards, electrical safety, utility, grid, import, tax, and local permit requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IRAM适用范围裁定、ENRE或配电商并网批准、电气安装批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行阿根廷标准、电气安全、公用事业、电网、进口、税务及地方许可要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IRAM適用範圍裁定、ENRE或配電商併網批准、電氣安裝批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿根廷標準、電氣安全、公用事業、電網、進口、稅務及地方許可要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Argentina, China GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 evidence is useful but not automatically equivalent to Argentina-side acceptance. The main gaps are IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 or IRAM-adopted references requested by buyers or engineers, connector interoperability, ENRE or distributor grid-connection review, 50 Hz configuration, and the fact that Argentina EV policy signals do not by themselves create a single national charger type-approval route.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩出口阿根廷时，GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234证据有参考价值，但不会自动等同于阿根廷侧认可。主要差距包括买方或工程师要求的IEC 61851/IEC 62196或IRAM采标参考、连接器互操作性、ENRE或配电商并网审查、50Hz配置，以及阿根廷电动汽车政策本身并不等于统一的全国充电桩型式批准路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁出口阿根廷時，GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234證據有參考價值，但不會自動等同於阿根廷側認可。主要差距包括買方或工程師要求的IEC 61851/IEC 62196或IRAM採標參考、連接器互操作性、ENRE或配電商併網審查、50Hz配置，以及阿根廷電動汽車政策本身並不等於統一的全國充電樁型式批准路徑。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, tax authority, electrical-safety authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
